name: Newell Brands Inc.
description: Newell Brands Inc. is a leading global consumer goods company that designs, manufactures, and distributes a diverse portfolio of well-known brands. Headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, the company operates across various segments, including home and commercial solutions, learning and development, and outdoor and recreation. Its extensive product lineup features iconic names such as Rubbermaid, Sharpie, Graco, and Coleman. By focusing on innovation and consumer-centric design, Newell Brands provides essential products that enhance the daily lives of people worldwide, maintaining a strong presence in both consumer and commercial markets through its global distribution network.
